reviews.review_description: It is a fun scare house but there's not much to do after a taking a tour still really cool

So I bought this game for party’s so I could dare people to try it and it gave me exactly what I wanted. The graphics were really good, and the games scary. It is not a game to consistently play but if you or you want somebody to get a quick scare, it’s a great game.

developer_response.body: Thank you really so much for your lovely feedback. It motivates us a lot for more development.

reviews.review_description: I started exploring the dark house and opened each door, some effects are really scary and some are ok. Totally worth buying and give a try. I read the review on sidequest and tried this.
